title: Sagler Mortar and Pestle Set - Small Grinding Bowl Container for Guacamole, Spices, Salsa, Pesto, Herbs - Best Mortar and Pestle Spice and Pills Crusher Set, Holds Up to 2.5oz - 3.75x2’’, Marble Gray
description:
About this item
Handy Kitchen Tool - Enjoy the rich flavors of fresh ground spices, paste, or herbs with our grinder mortar pestle set. At 3.75x2”, the stone grinder bowl can hold up to 2.5oz of wet or dry ingredients.
Crafted to Last - Made of solid marble stone, our molcajete bowl won’t easily break or crack even with frequent use. The spice crusher bowl's interior is unpolished and rough for better grinding.
Beautiful Pill Crusher Set - The stone mortar and pestle are all white with gray accents and a smooth outer finish. This grinder set for spice will look gorgeous on your countertop or kitchen shelf.
Versatile, Easy To Use - Crush ingredients like garlic and ginger using circular motions and firm pressure. Crack seeds and nuts, add some oil, and grind them into a fine paste. Pulverize large pills into powder!
Effortless Cleaning - After use, rinse the marble mortar and pestle with a sponge soaked thoroughly in warm water and let them dry. The guacamole bowl molcajete won’t harbor stains or odors.
reviews_5s:
Can use this product with pretty much another. Fits comfortably in hand. Daintyand prettyWhile searching for a mortar and pestle I noticed the measurements were always gives so when I checked with a ruler, I realized many were for grinding pills but would be too small for easily grinding herbs. This one seemed perfect and it is. Just beautiful, sturdy and fits nicely in your hand or on the counter. The opening is just wide enough for both small and larger items. If you are looking for an item like this make sure to check the measurements so it is the right size for what you want to grind.Great mortar an nestle and lovely. I liked it so much I bought another one. Be careful when washing. Mine slipped and hit bottom of sink and a tiny piece on the edge broke off. I decided not to wash anymore as I use it to only crush large vitamins.This is ideal for grinding my freshly grown, dried herbs. It is a great addition to my kitchen tools.Needed to crush my mother's pills and this works fantastic with little effort. Great quality and price!!!
Strongly recommend.!!!Wonderful, been using for a few monthsI've been giving my old dog supplements and even though some of them are supposed to be chewable, she refuses to eat them. So I'd been breaking them up and mashing them with a butter knife, which was a real pain. Finally, it dawned on me to buy a mortar and pestle. Found this one and figured it was a good price, so I'd give it a whirl. It makes grinding up the pills into powder that I mix in her food a breeze - easy and much faster than my old way. The actual mortar and pestle are well made, solid, and attractive. It's not huge, but I find it to be the perfect size for my needs. I can fit several larger size chewable tablets and have plenty of room. The interior surface is not smooth but it helps with the grinding and generally just requires a light tap to get all the powder to release.My first one was broken before delivery. The second one arrived safelyThis item arrivdr on time .It is what it is.Very nice marbled and shape
Good for grinding spices or crushing meds
reviews_1s:
I'm just starting out in herbalism and I'm on a budget so I thought this would be good instead of the porous stone ones. It was a big mistake. It doesn't grind, it just mashes things. And I've only had it for two weeks and it's already chipped. 😩 I really want my money back.I do not recommend this for food items or pills, as the stone constantly sheds a white powder when in use. I don’t want the chemicals and possibly lead in my food. I have washed this thoroughly but it continues to shed white powder.I had to return this item because the pestle was broken. Also, the bowl was dusty and couldn’t be wiped clean. Not a satisfactory product by any meansThe pestle broke in half on me on the third use. I never dropped it or used it for anything inappropriate. I notified the company and their reply was basically, "Too bad for you. The only warranty we offer is Amazon's 30-day money back guarantee." In other words, there is no warranty.

I should have looked at more of the low ratings. Most of them are for this very same problem.This product is CHEAPLY MADE. I threw it in the trash can. Very disappointedThe mortar arrived crushed it would be impossible to remove it from the box.
The pestle is intact but useless without the mortal Will returnSmaller than I realized and after washed and dried and used , chalky substance was coming off as I used it so never used again.Used to crush dog meds (tiny). After several months, mortar broke in half!I certainly wish it would have lasted longer than 4 months!Arrived broken.
